National Crepe Suzette Day

images.alt:
Crêpe Suzette is a classic French dessert that consists of thin, delicate pancakes (crepes) that are typically served warm and coated in a sweet and tangy orange sauce, made with butter, sugar, orange juice, orange zest, and Grand Marnier or another orange-flavored liqueur. The crepes may also be flambéed with additional liqueur, which creates a dramatic presentation and enhances the flavor.
Crêpe Suzette was created in the late 19th century by a French chef named Auguste Escoffier, who was preparing a dessert for the Prince of Wales (later King Edward VII) and his dinner guests. The story goes that the dish was named after one of the guests, a young woman named Suzette, who was dining with the prince that evening. Today.
Crêpe Suzette is considered a classic dessert in French cuisine and is enjoyed in fine restaurants around the world

National Beverage Day

images.alt:
National Beverage Day is a day to celebrate and enjoy all types of beverages, from nonalcoholic drinks like water, juice, and soda, to alcoholic beverages like wine, beer, and cocktails. It is celebrated annually on May 6th in the United States.
On National Beverage Day, people may choose to try a new beverage, mix up a favorite cocktail, or simply raise a glass to toast their favorite drink. Many restaurants and bars may offer specials or promotions on drinks, and some organizations or groups may host events or tastings to celebrate the day.
In addition to enjoying a refreshing beverage, National Beverage Day is also a good opportunity to learn about the history and cultural significance of different drinks, as well as the science and technology behind the production and distribution of beverages.

AWS Site-to-Site VPN now supports modifying tunnel bandwidth on existing VPN connections

AWS Site-to-Site VPN now supports modifying tunnel bandwidth between standard (up to 1.25 Gbps) and large (up to 5 Gbps) on existing connections, making it easier to update your VPN conn...

#AWS #AwsSiteToSite

external.description:
AWS Site-to-Site VPN now supports modifying tunnel bandwidth between standard (up to 1.25 Gbps) and large (up to 5 Gbps) on existing connections, making it easier to update your VPN connections’ bandwidth per your organization’s need.
 
 Previously, changing tunnel bandwidth required deleting and recreating the connection, which generated new tunnel IP addresses and meant updating your on-premises VPN device configuration and firewall rules. With this launch, tunnels are upgraded while preserving your IP addresses, CIDR blocks, pre-shared keys, and all configuration settings, eliminating the need to make any changes to your on-premises device.
 
 This feature is available in the following AWS Regions: US East (N. Virginia, Ohio), US West (N. California), AWS GovCloud (US-West), Europe (Frankfurt, London, Paris, Spain, Stockholm), Asia Pacific (Hong Kong, Hyderabad, Jakarta, Malaysia, Mumbai, New Zealand, Osaka, Seoul, Sydney, Taipei, Thailand, Tokyo), Africa (Cape Town), Mexico (Central), and South America (São Paulo). To learn more and get started, visit the AWS Site-to-Site VPN https://docs.aws.amazon.com/vpn/latest/s2svpn/modify-vpn-connection-options.html.
external.title: AWS Site-to-Site VPN now supports modifying tunnel bandwidth on existing VPN connections

New JMIR Periop Med: Evaluating the Impact of Virtual Reality on Orthopedic Trauma Skills Acquisition Among #surgical Residents: Randomized Crossover #study

external.description: Background: Orthopedic trauma skills training is time-consuming and expensive. Current training modalities rely heavily on synthetic bone models, anatomical laboratory simulations, or assistance in #surgeries (the #apprenticeship model). Virtual reality (VR) #appears to present a promising complement to current training modalities. Objective: This #study evaluated the effectiveness of VR training on #surgical performance and gauged learning preferences among orthopedic trauma residents in Malaysia. Methods: In total, 123 orthopedic residents were randomly assigned to 2 groups. One group practiced for about 30 minutes using VR glasses, followed by conventional nailing exercises on synthetic bones, while the other group first performed the nailing exercise, followed by VR practice. Performance was measured by time to completion of the exercise, and participants completed a postexercise survey. Results: Participants who completed VR training before the synthetic bone nailing exercise were significantly faster, completing the task between 4 (=.05) and 7 (=.002) minutes more quickly than without VR training. In addition, VR training improved self-assessed performance during the exercise. Survey data revealed that while 43% (50/117) of participants preferred conventional methods of learning (lectures, discussions, and hands-on simulations), 89% (104/117) of participants supported VR use as an adjunct to conventional methods of learning. Less than 2% (2/117, 1.7%) of participants indicated that conventional methods of learning were outdated. Conclusions: A single session of VR training significantly reduced completion times and improved self-assessment of competence in orthopedic trauma simulation exercises. Although learners continue to value conventional training modalities, there is a strong desire to include VR as a supplementary tool. Its integration into #surgical curricula may accelerate skill acquisition, especially in low-resource settings with limited access to high-fidelity simulation labs. In addition, the availability of VR training modules in hospitals could help residents and junior consultants prepare for #surgery.
external.title: Evaluating the Impact of Virtual Reality on Orthopedic Trauma Skills Acquisition Among #surgical Residents: Randomized Crossover #study

record.text: New JMIR MedInform: #digital #health Communication for Deaf Individuals: Scoping Review of Technologies, Strategies, and Outcomes

external.description: Background: Hearing loss affects approximately 432 million adults globally, with Deaf individuals representing a distinct linguistic and cultural minority that faces significant barriers to accessing #health information. These challenges contribute to #health disparities by limiting preventive education and timely #health interventions. Objective: This scoping review examines the effectiveness of #digital communication technologies in promoting #health literacy, awareness, and #health-related skills among Deaf adults and children. Methods: A comprehensive literature search was conducted across 5 major databases: MEDLINE, Embase, Scopus, Web of Science, and PubMed, focusing on peer-reviewed studies published in English within the past 10 years. Seventeen studies were included, encompassing a variety of #research designs, including randomized controlled trials, cross-sectional surveys, and mixed methods approaches. Data extraction focused on intervention type, outcomes, and target populations. Results: Findings indicate that video-based interventions are the most prevalent and effective, leveraging sign language, subtitles, and animations to enhance accessibility and comprehension. These #digital tools improved #health awareness, knowledge acquisition, and the practical application of #health-related skills across both adult and child populations. Interventions ranged from stroke preparedness and cancer education to breast self-examination and cardiopulmonary resuscitation training. Social media platforms, SMS text messaging campaigns, and e#health programs were also identified as effective in promoting preventive #health behaviors. Despite these promising outcomes, several challenges remain, including limited #digital literacy, inconsistent access to technology, and a lack of culturally and linguistically appropriate content. Additionally, most studies were geographically concentrated in the United States, with a limited number of high-quality randomized trials. Conclusions: This review highlights the transformative potential of accessible #digital technologies to reduce #health disparities and promote #health equity among Deaf individuals. Future #research should prioritize inclusive, culturally sensitive, and user-centered designs and explore emerging platforms to maximize engagement and improve #health outcomes. Trial Registration: OSF Registry; https://osf.io/rezgm/overview
external.title: #digital #health Communication for Deaf Individuals: Scoping Review of Technologies, Strategies, and Outcomes

record.text: New JMIR MedInform: AI and Internet of Things for Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease Remote Monitoring: Systematic Review of Exacerbation Prediction and Key Physiological Variables

external.description: Background: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) is a leading cause of morbidity and mortality worldwide, with frequent exacerbations of COPD (ECOPD) significantly impacting #patient #health and #health care systems. Predicting ECOPD early would increase #patients’ quality of life and decrease the economic burden. The advancement of wearable technologies and Internet of Things (IoT) sensors has enabled continuous remote monitoring (RM), offering new opportunities for early ECOPD prediction. However, effectively leveraging wearable data requires robust artificial intelligence (#AI) (AI) frameworks capable of processing heterogeneous physiological and environmental information. Objective: This systematic review aims to provide a comprehensive overview of both hardware and software solutions for predicting ECOPD using RM. From the reviewed literature, we first focus on key physiological and environmental variables essential for COPD monitoring that can be extracted from wearables and IoT sensors. Second, we describe the wearable and IoT devices currently deployed in COPD management. Finally, we review machine learning, including deep learning models, used for ECOPD prediction, discussing limitations for real-world implementation. By bridging AI-driven data processing with real-world sensor applications, this review aims to outline the current landscape, existing challenges, and future directions for developing effective RM solutions for ECOPD predictions. Methods: A comprehensive search was conducted following the PRISMA (Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses) guidelines to identify studies using AI or machine learning techniques for predicting ECOPD in in-home contexts. Results: This review identified 26 studies that met the inclusion criteria. Twenty studies aimed at predicting or detecting exacerbations at the onset. The variables tracked most frequently were heart rate (n=9), peripheral oxygen saturation (n=9), and symptoms (n=8). Daily or weekly sampling was most common (n=14). Most studies (n=13) applied machine learning models—primarily random forest (n=5), CatBoost (n=2), decision trees (n=2), and support vector machines (n=2). Deep learning was used in 3 papers, while the remaining applied rule-based logics and probabilistic models. Wearables and IoT were used in only 6 out of 20 studies. Six papers analyzed changes in vital parameters during prodromal phases, defined as the period shortly before the onset of an exacerbation. Three studies collected data continuously, 2 daily, and 1 compared once-daily versus overnight monitoring; 4 of these 6 used wearable devices. Conclusions: Overall, current evidence highlights the potential of continuous monitoring of physiological and environmental variables for early ECOPD prediction, offering advantages over questionnaires or once-daily measurements. While wearables and IoT devices show promise, their use remains limited. Many studies rely on balanced datasets that do not mirror real-world exacerbation patterns and lack external validation across diverse populations. Future #research should emphasize large-scale validation, integration of multimodal data, and translation of AI models into clinically feasible tools to enable timely intervention and improve COPD management. Trial Registration: PROSPERO CRD420251051302; https://www.crd.york.ac.uk/PROSPERO/view/CRD420251051302

The Evolution of Video Pokies and Yggdrasil’s Influence

Video pokies have evolved far beyond traditional slots, embracing storytelling, complex features, and interactive elements. Yggdrasil’s signature style is marked by high-quality graphics, vivid animations, and innovative game mechanics that create an immersive atmosphere. These elements work together to maintain player interest over extended periods, encouraging deeper exploration of each game’s unique theme and features. This evolution highlights an ongoing trend where gameplay fluidity becomes as important as visual appeal.

With each release, Yggdrasil challenges conventional design by integrating adaptive soundtracks and intuitive interfaces that contribute to a natural flow during gameplay. This approach minimizes interruptions and emphasizes continuous engagement, making their video pokies feel less like a series of spins and more like an unfolding adventure.

Key Features That Bring Flow to Video Pokies

One of the core strengths of Yggdrasil’s video pokies lies in their ability to maintain rhythm and momentum. This is achieved through several design choices:

 * Dynamic Animations: Smooth transitions and responsive visual feedback reinforce the sense of flow, ensuring players remain visually stimulated without overwhelming the senses.

 * Innovative Bonus Rounds: Instead of static bonus games, Yggdrasil’s titles often feature multi-level challenges and cascading wins that keep the gameplay engaging and unpredictable.

 * Adaptive Gameplay Mechanics: Elements such as shifting reels, expanding symbols, and interactive features contribute to a gameplay loop that feels organic rather than mechanical.

 * Balanced Pacing: The games avoid prolonged downtime between spins, maintaining a steady tempo that supports continuous player immersion.

These features collectively foster a seamless player journey, offering more than just random outcomes by emphasizing narrative progression and interactivity.

How Video Pokies Enhance Player Experience in Online Casinos

The rise of video pokies with a fluid design paradigm has notably impacted how online casinos attract and retain players. The engaging nature of titles that showcase Yggdrasil’s craftsmanship encourages longer sessions and repeated visits. Players are drawn to the combination of high-quality graphics and smooth gameplay, which together provide a compelling alternative to simpler slot machines.

Such video pokies also accommodate a broad range of preferences by balancing accessibility with depth. Novice players can enjoy straightforward features while more experienced users find advanced strategies and bonus complexities rewarding. This versatility contributes to a diverse gaming ecosystem where player satisfaction is driven by both entertainment and challenge.

Practical Considerations When Exploring Video Pokies

Engaging with video pokies that embody a fresh sense of flow requires some mindful considerations. Players should be aware of the inherent variability and randomness that come with all forms of digital slots. Managing bankroll and setting limits remain crucial practices to ensure that gaming stays enjoyable and within personal boundaries.

Furthermore, understanding the game’s paytable and bonus structures can enhance the overall experience, allowing more informed decisions during play. The smooth integration of features in Yggdrasil’s video pokies means that the user interface often provides clear guidance, but taking time to familiarize oneself with specific mechanics can lead to a more satisfying session.

Responsibility is a key aspect of engaging with any form of gambling entertainment. While the design of these video pokies promotes flow and engagement, it’s important for players to approach gameplay with awareness and moderation.

Conclusion: The Lasting Impact of Yggdrasil’s Video Pokies on Online Slots

Yggdrasil’s approach to video pokies successfully introduces a new dimension of flow and style that resonates with modern players seeking more immersive online slot experiences. By combining artistic innovation with fluid gameplay, their offerings set a standard for how digital slots can evolve beyond simple mechanics into rich, engaging adventures.

This fresh sense of flow not only enhances player enjoyment but also contributes to the ongoing transformation of online slot gaming into a more diverse and captivating form of entertainment. I am depicted as a life-sized marionette puppet, with visible wooden joints at my elbows and knees and pale, painted porcelain skin. I have messy black and white yarn hair that’s getting wet in the rain, and heavy black theatrical makeup that is streaking down my cheeks like tears. I’m wearing a tattered, oversized pastel pink coat that’s too big for my frame, the cuffs dragging in the puddle. Above me, thick, visible strings stretch up into the dark, rainy sky, attaching to my wrists and head, looking impossibly tight. My expression is blank and empty, black glass eyes staring into nothing. The vibe is haunting, fragile, and deeply lonely—a doll realizing it was made for nothing but to be played with.
